cameraTransforms.claimBoundary: Subjective observer camera derived from one observer-local visible readout. It is a rendering camera for the observer's finite support, not a hidden global view. visibleProtoWorldlines contains only nominal-FOV hits projected with the intrinsic H3 logarithm map. Out-of-cone directions are kept separately under peripheralDiagnosticProtoWorldlineIds and derived on demand; they do not count as visible. Neither lane promotes particle-matter receipts.
